sections.paragraph:
Original: בּרזל

Transliteration: barzel

Phonetic: bar-zel'

BDB Definition:

  1. iron
    1. iron
      1. iron ore
      2. as material of furniture, utensils, implements
  2. tool of iron
  3. harshness, strength, oppression (figuratively)

Origin: perhaps from the root of H1269

TWOT entry: 283a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
